case_title: CALIFORNIA SUNSHINE FINE FOODS INC., A CALIF. CORP vs. MARTINEZ, HANNA AKA CAROL MARTINEZ et al

docket_entries.description: OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-29-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-29-1997, TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT.
